Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}All right, everyone. This is who I've been talking to you about. He'll be joining us in student council starting today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'm Hidetoshi Odagiri. I supervise the disciplinary committee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I'm Chihiro Fushimi, the treasurer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I'm a first-year, and um, I'm still learning the ropes, so please be patient with me, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You must be quite talented to be hand-picked by the president herself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I look forward to working with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You must be quite talented to be hand-picked by the president herself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 102 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I look forward to working with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think I made a good[n]impression on Odagiri.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I joined the student council and[n]got to know the members.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I hope I get along with everyone here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}It's getting late. Introductions will be enough for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}What we want from you is to assist us as necessary.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}From now on, you have my permission to enter the student council room whenever you wish.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Your time is your own after school, but try to remember the student council every now and then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}We meet on {f 0 1 2}Mondays, Wednesdays, and Fridays{f 0 1 27}. But we don't meet on days before tests.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with the student council[n]members and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
